body.title: Create /audit-hypothesis skill — 5 checks + better-hypothesis challenge
body.description:
Hypotheses extracted at /decided time need their own audit before tickets are filed — a vague or untestable hypothesis produces no useful outcome data.

**Affected files:** agent_datacenter/skills/audit-hypothesis/SKILL.md (new)
**Design rules:** follows PASS/AMEND pattern; blocks /decided ticket-filing on AMEND same as audit-design does
**Scope boundary:** in scope: 5 checks: (1) hypothesis is a testable claim not a vague hope, (2) measurement signal is observable now not aspirational, (3) goal link is valid and active, (4) hypothesis doesn't contradict a recently-falsified one, (5) time horizon for checking outcome is named. Plus mandatory challenge: 'Is there a better hypothesis for achieving this goal?' Out of scope: actually running the measurement (that's /outcome); storing outcome data.
**Test plan:** skill file; manual smoke against the hypotheses extracted during this design conversation.
